results.routing_rationale: Query spans relationships and the career/wealth implications of Sasha Yoga; requires UCN-level synthesis of contradictory signals (7H exaltation vs. Bhavabala rank-12 weakness) across domains. WCR mandatory.

Query requires synthesis of three top-ranked convergence signals across career, wealth, and spirituality domains — a three-domain interpretive integration. Timing language (Mercury MD activation window) adds temporal indexing. Explicit CVG-layer references demand UCN-anchored whole-chart architecture. WCR mandatory.

Query asks for the Atmakaraka's soul-mission signature and explicitly requests synthesis across career, relationships, and spiritual path — spanning 4+ life domains. UCN-level whole-chart integration is mandatory to trace AK influence across all domains without reductive single-domain framing.

Query explicitly spans two domains (relationships and career) and demands synthesis of contradictory structural signals (Bhavabala rank-12 weakness vs. SAV rank-1 strength in 7H). The explicit UCN reference adds architectural depth. WCR mandatory for cross-domain contradiction resolution.

Query spans three explicit domains (relationships, wealth, creative output) and requires synthesis of contradictory signals — Venus Shadbala weakness compounded across domains vs. NBRY D9 cancellation mitigation via Mercury Vargottama. UCN-level whole-chart architecture is mandatory to correctly weigh the neechabhanga pathway against aggregate debility.

UCN-vs-domain-report consistency check within a single life domain (relationships/emotional security). Two documents are cited but only one life domain is at stake — interpretive_single per disambiguation rule A.

Query requires synthesis of contradictory dignity signals (Jupiter own-sign 9H with highest Graha Bala vs. Uccha Bala rank-7 weakness) across career, father-karaka, and guru-karaka domains. Explicit UCN-layer contradiction analysis is needed, spanning career implications and dharmic/spiritual mentorship themes. WCR mandatory.

Cross-document consistency check (UCN vs. Career domain report) within a single life domain (career). The query asks whether Mercury's UCN designation as 'chart operational spine' aligns with the Career report's significator hierarchy — two documents, one domain. Disambiguation rule A applies: interpretive_single.

Cross-document consistency check (UCN/MSR vs. Wealth domain report) within a single life domain (wealth/foreign income). Two documents are cited but only one life domain is at stake — interpretive_single per disambiguation rule A. UCN-layer explicit reference adds +0.10 to base.

Query focuses on a single domain (relationships/partnerships) but requires chart-layer depth to compare MSR signal-level descriptions against the Relationships domain report — specifically checking for contradictions or divergences in spouse characterization and marriage timing. UCN context needed to reconcile potential signal-vs-report discrepancies.

Primary intent: validate whether a specific dasha compounding window is currently active and identify falsifiers. Time-gated validity check per disambiguation rule B — 'Is window X active?' resolves to timing.

Primary intent is time-indexing a specific transit event (~2040 Rahu return to natal Bhrigu Bindu) with a secondary interpretive ask about the event class in the 10H career domain. Timing language ('when') is the lead framing; the interpretive and falsifier conditions are subordinate to the temporal anchor.

Primary intent is time-indexed validation — whether a specific triple-activation window (transit + Kakshya + Sade Sati) is currently active and what would falsify the structural-benefit prediction. Timing is the core axis, but the 'structurally beneficial' framing implicates career and spiritual domains where Saturn-Pisces signals land.

Primary intent is time-indexed: identifying the closing window of Mercury MD (August 2027) and the yoga-peak period it governs. The falsifier request adds interpretive depth across multiple domains (career, wealth, spirituality — wherever Mercury-member yogas apply), but the core ask is anchored to a specific dasha boundary and temporal closure. Timing language ('window closes', 'MD ends', '2010-2027') dominates.

Primary intent is a time-gated validity check: was a specific 2012 transit predictively confirmed, and which Life Event Log entries serve as retrodictive confirmers or falsifiers? Per disambiguation rule B, 'Was transit Y predictively confirmed?' resolves to timing. Career and wealth included as likely domains the Bhrigu Bindu transit prediction would implicate.

Query requires synthesis of four simultaneous timing-indexed signals (Saturn AD, Sade Sati, yoga peaks, CV.05 convergence) across multiple life domains — career, wealth, relationships, spirituality — all converging in a single dasha window. The explicit MSR/CV signal references and multi-layer overlap demand full UCN-anchored whole-chart integration.

Query demands full-arc synthesis of Mercury MD across five life domains (career, wealth, international travel/career, relationships, spirituality) into a unified narrative — the maximum possible cross-domain integration. Timing language (MD arc 2010–2027) is present but serves as the frame for interpretive synthesis, not the primary ask. WCR mandatory.

Query explicitly asks for multi-domain ramifications of the AK Moon's 12H Chalit placement vs. its 4L lordship, spanning spirituality (moksha/12H), psychology (emotional comfort/4L), relationships (home/heart axis), and career (foreign settlement implications). Requires UCN-level synthesis of the AK-4L structural tension across domains. WCR mandatory.

Query explicitly demands compound (not domain-by-domain) synthesis of Sasha Mahapurusha Yoga across career authority, marriage, social standing, and foreign dealings — four distinct life domains requiring integrated UCN-level architectural framing. WCR mandatory.

Query demands integrated synthesis of four named yogas across four life domains (career, wealth, relationships, spirituality) within a specific 2024-2027 timing window, with explicit requests for calibrated confidence and falsifier conditions — requiring full UCN-anchored whole-chart architecture. WCR mandatory.
